General.Name: Net A Go Technology Co Ltd
General.Description: Net-A-Go Technology Company Limited, an investment holding company, provides environmental maintenance business in Hong Kong and Mainland China. It operates through Environmental maintenance business, Media advertising and marketing business, and Trading business segments. The company is also involved in property leasing business; securities trading business; and trading of cosmetic products. It is also involved in lease of investment properties; media advertising and marketing business; and provision of environmental hygiene and cleaning service. The company was incorporated in 2013 and is headquartered in Hong Kong, Hong Kong.
